HOME.TITLE: Hi, I am
HOME.NAME: Guilherme Fernandes Pavezzi
HOME.DESCRIPTION: Full Stack Developer specializing in C# and .NET ecosystems. I build modern web applications with Angular, focusing on robust API architecture and scalable solutions that prioritize performance and clean code.

ABOUT.TITLE: About Me
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: Since 2020, I have been crafting robust digital solutions as a Full Stack Developer. My practical experience is centered on the C# and Angular ecosystem, with a strong focus on building and optimizing APIs and microservices architectures. I prioritize delivering clean code and functional interfaces, constantly evolving my skillset to solve complex challenges with modern technology.

JOBS.TITLE: Companies Worked
JOBS.DESCRIPTION: Developed and maintained tinting systems, focusing on APIs (C# / ASP.NET MVC) and web interfaces using Angular. Responsible for implementing new features and ensuring seamless front-end/back-end integration, while following coding best practices and meeting strict project deadlines.
JOBS.DESCRIPTION2: Developed EDI (Electronic Data Interchange) solutions for Azul Airlines. Built C# microservices for invoice processing and data integration across JSON, XML, and NOTFIS formats. Managed the analysis, troubleshooting, and transmission of logistics files (OCOREN, CONEMB, DOCCOB), ensuring data quality between commercial partners.

MYPORTFOLIO.DESCRIPTION: Personal website developed with Angular, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, showcasing projects, skills, and experiences.
